info.description: Trusted practitioners Anna recommends — therapists, coaches, healers, and bodyworkers in her circle. Shown on the /practitioners page as a 3-column grid with occasional full-width banner cards. Same layout pattern as /testimonials so Anna edits them the same way.

role.description: Their professional title or specialism. Example: 'Somatic Therapist', 'EMDR Practitioner', 'Acupuncturist'. Keep tight — 1-4 words.

bio.description: Short description of who they are and what they do. 1-3 sentences. Use plain text — paragraph breaks (blank line) work if you need them.

portrait.description: Portrait photo of the practitioner. Square works best (800×800), or portrait orientation. JPEG, max 500 KB.

website_url.description: Their professional website. The whole card on /practitioners links here when clicked. Use the full URL: https://example.com

instagram_handle.description: Optional. Just the handle without the @ — e.g. 'sarahhughes_therapist'. Shown as a small Instagram link under their bio.

email.description: Optional contact email. Shown as a 'Get in touch' link if provided. Leave blank to hide.

location.description: Optional. Where they're based or where they work. Example: 'London, in-person + online' or 'Online only'.

display_style.description: How this practitioner renders on the /practitioners page. 'card' = standard 3-column grid item. 'banner' = full-width prominent block between rows (use sparingly for featured practitioners, 1 in every 6-10 entries).

sort_order.description: Lower numbers show first. Default 100. Use 10, 20, 30… if you want fine control.

is_active.description: Untick to hide this practitioner from the live site without deleting them.
